title: Dungeons Reborn
description: Vanilla friendly mod that adds Minecraft Dungeons style content to the game
body:
## Welcome to Dungeons Reborn!
![v0.1.0](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a019a62c0cc031abf63e238f6f6d4bb26660e08a_0.webp)
_This is a vanilla friendly mod that adds content from Minecraft Dungeons to the base game. The goal is to add as many weapons and artifacts from **Dungeons** to **Vanilla** as possible, while keeping them **balanced** and preserving their **unique playstyle**._

### NEWS: This mod now has a Discord server!
Join if you want to support my work. You can also make suggestions and report issues there!
https://discord.gg/E68h7WRKRT

### IMPORTANT!
**For versions 1.21.1 and 1.21.3 I recommend using the Continuity mod to enable emmisive textures!**
https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity

![All currently available weapons](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/184257ee9a1be029f49ff12ded1a16611b7eab6d.png)
### Current list of Artifacts:
- __Death Cap Mushroom [common/rare]__: Increases movement speed and damage of its user
  - Can be found in Woodland Mansions and Dungeons
- __Iron Hide Amulet [common/rare]__: provides a major defense boost to its user
  - Can be found in Woodland Mansions and Pillager Outpost
### Current list of Ranged Weapons:
- __Twin Bow [unique]__: Bonus shot ability (aimbot), you can shoot 2 arrows at once
  - Can be found in Jungle Temples
- __Auto Crossbow [unique]__: Accelerate ability, you get a reload bonus after each shot
  - Can be found in Woodland Mansions
### Current list of Meele Weapons:
- __Rough Diamond Pickaxe [unique]__: Prospector ability
  - Can be found in Dungeons
- __Rough Diamond Sword [unique]__: Has built in Sharpness 5 enchantment
  - Can be found in Dungeons
- __Broadsword [unique]__: Powerful pushback attack + built in Sharpness 5 enchantment
  - Can be found in Woodland Mansions
- __Claymore [common/rare]__: Powerful pushback attack
  - Can be found in Woodland Mansions
- __Steel Mace [common/rare]__: Powerful combo attack
  - Can be found in Pillager Outposts
 ### List of Miscellaneous Features:
- __Midnight Moss vegetation__: Features plants that can glow during nighttime (Popflower) and interract with their environment
- __Mossy Spruce and Oak Planks__: Decorative block variants
- __Midnight Mossy Cobblestone__: Cyan colored Cobblestone variant crafted with Midnight Moss block  

_I plan on adding more weapons in the future, you can go to the Gallery section to see which ones I am currently working on._
